---
title: "Chase Mathis"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/ChaseBerkeley.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
---


I am a Statistics PhD student at UC Berkeley, $\mathbb{E}$xpected
to graduate in 2030. Previously, 
I graduated from Duke University with a BS in Mathematics and Statistics. 
My current interests include: sequential testing,
defensive forecasting, and distribution free inference.

*Contact: cmathis [at] berkeley [dot] edu*

*Office : 357 Evans Hall, Berkeley CA, 94704*
